final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing travel guide brochure mockup for a 4-day Hangzhou itinerary, featuring a realistic Hangzhou map as the background.

Style/medium: flat lay product photography, realistic paper craft mockup, trifold brochure design with dimensional pop-up elements
Composition: top-down flat lay view, trifold brochure spread open on textured kraft paper, famous landmarks floating as 3D paper cutouts above the map
Subject: 4-day Hangzhou travel itinerary brochure with realistic Hangzhou city map as background, iconic landmarks suspended above the card stock
Scene/backdrop: clean kraft paper surface, soft studio lighting, minimalist workspace aesthetic
Lighting/mood: soft diffused overhead lighting, gentle shadows under floating elements, warm and inviting travel mood
Color palette: warm kraft brown base, vibrant map colors for landmarks, clean white brochure paper, natural greens for West Lake references
Materials/textures: matte kraft paper texture, smooth brochure paper, dimensional paper cutout landmarks with subtle shadow depth
Text (verbatim): "第一天：西湖经典游，打卡教科书里的江南 路线：断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺 第二天：禅意杭州，穿越千年宋韵 路线：灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城 第三天：九溪烟树徒步，做一日茶山散人 路线：九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径 第四天：文艺收官，解锁杭州AB面 方案A：运河文艺线 拱宸桥→桥西历史街区→小河直街→大兜路香积寺 方案B：西溪湿地轻奢游"
Constraints: brochure must clearly show trifold structure, landmarks must appear to float with realistic shadows, Hangzhou map must be recognizable
Avoid: cluttered layout, unreadable small text, generic stock photos, plastic-looking materials, watermark
